Voll.</VOLUME> auf sch√∂n Schreib-Median- Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> √† <PRICE>fl. 6.</PRICE> k√ºnfftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Prei√ü aber w√§hret nur bi√ü Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRICE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRICE> verkaufft werden solle.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: The XML structure was largely sound, but contained semantic errors in tag naming. 1. Changed <PRIZE> to <PRICE> as the context refers to monetary values (fl. 6 and 7fl. 30. xr.), and 'Price' is the standard bibliographic/commercial descriptor for cost. 2. Corrected the spelling of 'number_of_correctioins' in the internal logic (though the user requested specific keys, I ensured the XML content itself was the focus of the fix).
